resources.string: Your Key could not be displayed!
Are you sure you want to wipe?

This app will wipe the device when a notification is received that contains your Key shown on the main screen.

This notification can come from any messaging app.

Save your Key on a device that can send messages to this device in order to wipe this device remotely.

1. Swipe down from the top of the screen twice

• First swipe: shows notifications
• Second swipe: opens the full Quick Settings panel

2. Tap the \￼ icon (at the bottom right of the panel)

3. Scroll through the list of available tiles and find the Wipe button at the bottom

4. Press and hold the button, then place it where you want

5. Tap the back button to stop editing the menu. It will save automatically
When the device is not unlocked within the specified time, it will automatically wipe. Be careful to set a sufficient timer before going on holidays or leaving the device in a drawer!
